summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GradNext Admin Panel iteration 4 features. All 8 requested features are working correctly: Candidate 1:1 Coaching shows 6 mentors, Admin Mentors with INR rates and Edit modal, Peer Practice search/filter, Cohort sections, Mentors API, Weekly availability (Mon-Sun), Quick Add ADDS slots.

minor.issue: Missing hourly_rate field in Pydantic model - FIXED during testing

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` - accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: DialogContent components should have aria-describedby for accessibility compliance (minor)
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/admin.py - Added hourly_rate, email, specialization to MentorUpdate model
seed_data_creation: Test mentors and cohorts created during testing (TEST_ prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 4 features verified working. Weekly availability uses Mon-Sun format with From/To time slots. Quick Add ADDS slots (doesn't replace). INR rates displayed as ₹12,000. Edit Mentor modal has all editable fields.

candidate_coaching_mentors.details: 1:1 Coaching page shows all 6 mentors with name, title, company, rating, sessions, experience, expertise tags, and bio

admin_mentors_inr_rates.details: Mentor cards display ₹12,000 Per Hour format (INR currency)

admin_mentors_edit_modal.details: Edit button (pencil icon) opens modal with Name, Email, Title, Company, Specialization, Hourly Rate (₹), Bio fields

admin_peer_practice_search.details: Search bar (data-testid='peer-search-input') and Status filter dropdown (All Statuses, Active, Paused, Removed)

admin_cohort_sections.details: Create Cohort button, Add Section buttons on each cohort, Add Resource buttons within sections

mentors_api.details: GET /api/mentors returns list of all mentors with required fields and defaults

weekly_availability_selector.details: Shows Mon-Sun with Add Slot buttons for each day, From/To time pickers

quick_add_adds_slots.details: Quick Add - Add Slot to All Days button ADDS slots (doesn't replace existing) - verified by slot count increase

mocked_apis.payments: Razorpay payments are MOCKED (no API keys configured)
